2199790.name: Home Before Winter (HBW)
2199790.description:
Home Before Winter is a turn-based, strategy game with a shoot em up mini game. Feel the cold power of your Gatling gun rip through your enemy, mobilize your troops and send them to conquer adjacent territories, but be sure to save enough men for when the enemy sends out a counter-offensive. Complete objective cards to gain bonuses and help your men conquer the world!

Turns are broken down into three phases:

  • Phase 1: Place units on your territories.

  • Phase 2: Attack from your territories and conquer more land and regions that will give you bonuses.

  • Phase 3: Move your units to strategic points on your land.

Once all players have taken their turn, a shoot em up minigame starts. Depending on how well you perform, you will get bonuses that will aid you in conquering the map!

Home Before Winter was built using the Godot Engine

Privacy Notice for HBW demo:

  • Home Before Winter does not collect personal data.

  • All gameplay statistics are stored locally on your device and are never transmitted or shared.

  • The game includes stylized fantasy violence appropriate for players aged 13 and up, and contains no chat, no user-generated content, and no interaction with strangers.

For our full privacy policy, visit our website:

corereactionstudios website → HBW Privacy Policy
